# bucket-skipped manifest
# Covers: Disposition Enum bucket-skipped; Ballot omits skipped decisions.
# Note: D2 has no debater files, is absent from the ballot, and receives no
# judge votes. The smoke test treats 0/0 no-vote state as equivalent to
# bucket-skipped at the parser level (disposition comes from the
# orchestrator, not from vote parsing).

DECISION_1 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_2 expected_disposition=bucket-skipped
DECISION_3 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=2,ANTI_THESIS=1
